title: code-analysis step result
description: Sidecar schema for the code-analysis workflow step.

ticket.description: JIRA ticket ID as provided by the user (preserves original case)

module_count.description: Number of modules analyzed by learn-code

languages_detected.description: Programming languages found in the repo

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the analyzed source repository

repo_analysis_path.description: Absolute path to the learn-code analysis directory (contains detection/, module-registry/, module-analysis/, relationships/, synthesis/). Recorded in progress file for downstream steps.
